# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Multi Stage Deployment Pipeline 
on: [push]
jobs:   
   build_job:      # Job to create artifact and save it as .zip or .jar for future use    
       runs-on: ubuntu-latest       
       steps:             
         - name: Checkout code            
           uses: actions/checkout@v2              
           
         - name: Set up Python 3.8          # install any necessary version of python or specify it here     
           uses: actions/setup-python@v2       
           with:                
              python-version: '3.x'  
               
         - name: Install dependencies     # Add your command to make sure all packages are installed, in this case install Flask and other requirements              
           run: |         
             pip install flask      
           
         - name: Build artifacts        # Specify how you build the application for production or any target (like Docker)    
           if: '${{ github.event_type == \'push\' }}'  // only trigger on pushes  
           run : |         
             echo "Building Application"        
              
       # Save artifacts as zip file   
        - name: Artifact uploader             
           uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2           
           with:               
                 path: './myapp.zip'  // Specify the location of your saved .jar or .ipr, can be relative to project root directory        
            
   deploy_job:     # Job for downloading artifacts and then run deployment scripts after build job       
       needs:      built    # This must reference the 'built' status from previous step           
           runs-on: ubuntu-latest         
           steps : 
              - name: Download Artifact                 
                uses: actions/download-artifact@v2            
                   with:                
                      path: './myapp.zip'     // Specify the location of downloaded .jar or ipf, can be relative to project root directory        
               # Add your commands for deploying artifacts here  (for example `unzip myapp.zip -d /usr/lib`)         
              - name: Run Deployment Script          
                run : |            // Your deployment script execution goes in this line  
                  echo "Deployed application"
